attributes.description: Namespace resource usage overview with CPU/memory trends, pod counts, container restarts, and namespace drilldowns.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      cluster = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
      pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid),
      deployments = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.deployment.name),
      cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
      cpu_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
      mem_ws = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
      mem_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit),
      vol_avail = MAX(k8s.volume.available),
      vol_cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity),
      restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY namespace = k8s.namespace.name
  | EVAL
      cpu_limit_util = ROUND(cpu_usage / cpu_limit, 4),
      mem_limit_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(mem_limit), 4),
      disk_util = ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(vol_avail) / TO_DOUBLE(vol_cap), 4)
  | KEEP namespace, cluster, pods, deployments, cpu_usage, cpu_limit_util, mem_ws, mem_limit_util,
  disk_util, restarts
  | SORT restarts DESC

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      cluster = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
      pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid),
      deployments = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.deployment.name),
      cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
      cpu_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
      mem_ws = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
      mem_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit),
      vol_avail = MAX(k8s.volume.available),
      vol_cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity),
      restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY namespace = k8s.namespace.name
  | EVAL
      cpu_limit_util = ROUND(cpu_usage / cpu_limit, 4),
      mem_limit_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(mem_limit), 4),
      disk_util = ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(vol_avail) / TO_DOUBLE(vol_cap), 4)
  | KEEP namespace, cluster, pods, deployments, cpu_usage, cpu_limit_util, mem_ws, mem_limit_util,
  disk_util, restarts
  | SORT restarts DESC

embeddableConfig.title: Namespaces
embeddableConfig.description: Namespace listing with pod/deployment counts, CPU usage, memory, and restarts. Drills down to Namespace Detail.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS ns_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS ns_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name)

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS cpu_usage = SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage)
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, cpu_usage
  | SORT cpu_usage DESC

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS cpu_usage = SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage)
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, cpu_usage
  | SORT cpu_usage DESC

CPU usage per namespace (cores).

Shows the 10 namespaces consuming the most CPU.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS mem_ws = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set)
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, mem_ws
  | SORT mem_ws DESC

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS mem_ws = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set)
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, mem_ws
  | SORT mem_ws DESC

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, restarts
  | SORT restarts DESC

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, restarts
  | SORT restarts DESC

Container restarts per namespace.

Shows the 10 namespaces with the most restarts.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS oom_events = SUM(container.memory.major_page_faults)
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, oom_events

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS oom_events = SUM(container.memory.major_page_faults)
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, oom_events

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by OOM events
embeddableConfig.description:
Major page faults per namespace over time.

High values indicate memory pressure and potential OOM kills.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid),
      running_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | EVAL non_running_pods = total_pods - running_pods
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, non_running_pods

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid),
      running_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | EVAL non_running_pods = total_pods - running_pods
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, non_running_pods

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by non-running pods
embeddableConfig.description:
Count of pods not in Running phase per namespace.

Non-running pods may indicate scheduling issues or resource constraints.
